content:
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - rabbitmq

apiVersion: secrets.hashicorp.com/v1beta1
kind: VaultStaticSecret
metadata:
  name: "rabbitmq-internal-credentials"
  namespace: "data-system"
spec:
  type: kv-v2
  mount: "secret"
  path: "website/rabbitmq/internal"
  destination:
    name: "rabbitmq-internal-credentials"
    create: true
  refreshAfter: "1h"
  vaultAuthRef: "default"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - namespace.yaml
  - source.yaml
  - internal-credentials.yaml
  - release.yaml
  - servicemonitor.yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: "data-system"

apiVersion: monitoring.coreos.com/v1
kind: ServiceMonitor
metadata:
  name: "rabbitmq"
  namespace: "data-system"
  labels:
    release: "metrics-stack"
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: "rabbitmq"
      app.kubernetes.io/name: "rabbitmq"
  namespaceSelector:
    matchNames:
      - "data-system"
  endpoints:
    - port: metrics
      interval: "30s"
      scrapeTimeout: "10s"

apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: ClusterIssuer
metadata:
  name: "cloudflare"
spec:
  acme:
    email: "admin@example.net"
    server: "https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory"
    privateKeySecretRef:
      name: "cloudflare-acme-account-key"
    solvers:
      - dns01:
          cloudflare:
            apiTokenSecretRef:
              name: "cloudflare-api-token"
              key: "api-token"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - namespace.yaml
  - cluster-issuer-cloudflare.yaml
  - traefik-default-tls.yaml
  - traefik-forward-auth-middleware.yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: "edge-system"

apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: TLSStore
metadata:
  name: "default"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  defaultCertificate:
    secretName: "wildcard-tls"

apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: "forward-auth"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  forwardAuth:
    address: "http://forward-auth.edge-system.svc.cluster.local:4181"
    trustForwardHeader: true
    authResponseHeaders:
      - "X-Forwarded-User"
      - "X-Forwarded-Email"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - api
  - frontend
